chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 161 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 29.05.2024 Mr. Athar Hussain Abro, Advocate holding brief for Mr. J. K. Jarwar, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel, under instructions, does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
